archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for Modern Dark Tech
reasoning: A dark tech portfolio should convey precision, modern engineering, and aesthetic sophistication. We are using deep obsidian bases with high-contrast off-white typography and a Neon Amber accent for a refined, 'terminal meets luxury' feel. This avoids generic SaaS aesthetics while feeling distinctly developer-focused.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-16 for main sections. Bento grids for secondary content.

buttons.primary: bg-accent_primary text-black font-semibold px-6 py-3 transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,176,0,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-border_color text-text_primary px-6 py-3 transition-colors hover:border-accent_primary hover:text-accent_primary font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-wider

cards.default: bg-background_secondary border border-border_color p-6 md:p-8 hover:border-glass_border transition-all duration-300 group

components.glass_header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10

animations.micro_interactions: Subtle scale on hover, glowing borders on focus

icons.style: stroke-1.5, matching text-secondary or accent color

sections_instructions.navbar: Glassmorphism sticky nav. Logo (GG) on left, links center, 'Hire Me' CTA on right.
sections_instructions.hero: Asymmetric layout. Massive H1 (Outfit). Overline label (JetBrains Mono). 'Available for hire' badge with pulsing Neon Amber dot. Buttons for Contact and Resume. Background: dark glowing mesh.
sections_instructions.about: Bento grid. Left: Text (Bio, GPA, Dean's list). Right: Developer Portrait with monochrome filter + neon accent border.
sections_instructions.experience: Minimalist vertical timeline. Large typography for roles, secondary text for dates and descriptions.
sections_instructions.projects: Bento or Grid layout (2 columns). Large cards with project images. Hover reveals text or expands image slightly. Use tags for tech stack.
sections_instructions.skills: Terminal-style look. Grouped lists (Languages, Frontend, Backend, Tools). Monospace fonts.
sections_instructions.education_and_certifications: Grid cards matching Experience style. Clean, structural.
sections_instructions.contact: Functional form. High-contrast input fields with focus:ring-accent_primary. Minimalist design.
sections_instructions.footer: Large typography footer. Links to GitHub, LinkedIn, Email.

images.description: Abstract dark background with neon amber mesh for the hero section.
Portrait of Guillaume Girishya for the About section.
Image for Full-stack restaurant app project.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements and key info must have a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case format (e.g., `data-testid="contact-form-submit-button"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow the theme strictly: Use Outfit for headings, IBM Plex Sans for body, JetBrains Mono for technical labels/code blocks.
Do NOT use pure white text; use #F4F4F5. Do NOT use pure black backgrounds; use #050505.
Implement a bento grid structure where applicable (e.g., About, Projects).
Make sure the contact form is functional.
Include all required sections: Hero, About, Experience, Projects, Skills, Education & Cert.
Use framer-motion for simple staggered reveals and layout transitions.
For the hero background image, use an overlay (e.g., bg-black/60) to ensure high text legibility.
